description: Style Notecarlton london gives simple slip-ons a season update. We simply love this simply designed pair. Style them with tonal chinos, a tee and a blazer for off-duty occasions. A super-comfy shoe with a slip-on styling, it's just right for this summer (which will last upto the next summer!)Product Details Brown slip-on style loafers with stitch detail along the seams of the toe boxSoft lining and footbedTough midsole and a TPU outsole, upraised at the heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
